scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'pre-commit hook installed (.githooks/pre-commit)'

scripts-descriptions.test: Run the default test suite (free + pro combo when Pro is present).
scripts-descriptions.test:free: Run free plugin in isolation — Pro is not loaded even if checked out.
scripts-descriptions.test:combo: Run the full testsuite with Pro loaded (tests/unit + tests/pro).
scripts-descriptions.test:pro: Run only tests/pro/* — requires Pro to be loaded.
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run only tests/unit/* without skipping Pro.
scripts-descriptions.test:docker: Run the full PHPUnit suite inside the wp-env Docker container (requires `composer test:docker:start` first).
scripts-descriptions.test:docker:unit: Run only tests/unit/* inside the wp-env Docker container.
scripts-descriptions.test:docker:start: Bring up the wp-env Docker stack (dev on :8888, tests on :8889).
scripts-descriptions.audit-rest: Audit mutation REST routes for REST_Auth helper usage (WS2-A gate; enforcing after WS2-B route migration).
